text: The contract administrator may communicate directly with a subcontractor when the underpayments are plainly evident and the subcontractor is cooperative. It is best to work through the prime contractor when the issues are complex, when there are significant  underpayments  and/or  the  subcontractor  is  not  cooperative.    In  all  cases, the subcontractor must ensure that the prime contractor receives a copy of the required corrective documentation.
